# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

image: maven:3-jdk-11

variables:
  ARTIFACT_NAME: "app"

.build_job:
  image: openjdk:11
  before_script:
    - apt-get update && apt-get install -y git
  script:
    - git clone https://github.com/your-repo.git
    - mvn clean package -DskipTests
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - "$ARTIFACT_NAME"
      - target/*.jar

build_job:
  stage: build
  extends: .build_job

deploy_job:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - apt-get update && apt-get install -y wget
    - wget https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/jobs/artifacts/$ARTIFACT_NAME/download?job=$BUILD_JOB_ID
    - chmod +x $ARTIFACT_NAME
    - ./$ARTIFACT_NAME

cache:
  paths:
    - ~/.m2/repository

rules:
  - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request"'
    when: manual
  - when: never

expire_in: 30 days
